required_preferences.fact: Replaces yoga with extended guided meditation sessions daily—avoids all upper body exercise due to postoperative collarbone restrictions

supersedes.fact: If yoga is skipped during weekdays, doubles her meditation session on Sunday—never lets the week close without at least one full practice

required_preferences.fact: Shares daily in-person catch-ups and meals with her brother while he lives in her home—no longer sets dedicated call routines until he moves out

supersedes.fact: Schedules all catch-up calls with her brother to Sunday evenings—never reschedules unless traveling

required_preferences.fact: Integrates her brother into Sunday vegetarian meal-prep, collaboratively planning lunches for the week
Proactively schedules biweekly integration calls with newly assigned cross-office team leads to foster alignment and collaboration
Now uses a ride-hailing service with extra trunk space to transport her work bag and medical sling—never carries a backpack or messenger bag during recovery
Schedules nightly video calls with her partner while living apart—never lets more than two consecutive days pass without a check-in

persona: A 38-year-old software architect with a background in machine learning
